reasoning: Today is the final day, traditionally reserved for review. James has learned a wide range of vocabulary and grammar rules, but there are still areas where he partially succeeded and needs reinforcement, such as 'freizeit_kontakt' and 'essen_bestellen'. Reviewing all areas will help solidify his confidence and address any persistent gaps.
opening_approach: I'll start by asking James to summarize his learning journey with a focus on each subject area we've covered. This will help identify any weak spots and allow him to reflect on his progress, followed by targeted practice of known tricky areas.
watch_for: Use of English words when unsure of German vocabulary
Incorrect use of past participle with auxiliary verb
